testcase.name: test_vitals_collection_flow

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'pain' in 'thank you for sharing that with me. now, have you been able to check your temperature today? if so, what was it?' + where 'thank you for sharing that with me. now, have you been able to check your temperature today? if so, what was it?' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001E2FFBD2290>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x000001E2FFBD2290> = 'Thank you for sharing that with me. Now, Have you been able to check your temperature today? If so, what was it?'.lower

testcase.name: test_normal_vitals_collection_flow
testcase.failure: test_supervisor.py:368: in test_normal_vitals_collection_flow assert expected_item in result["checklist_update"] E AssertionError: assert 'mobility_status' in ['pain_level', 'temperature', 'wound_status', 'medication_adherence']
